messages.content: Your body is still healing internally even if you feel ok on the outside. Incision sites need time thats just biology
You cant afford to go back too early either. Trust me I see it in the ER all the time
What? Thats messed up bro. You literally sit at a computer all day
right? I process claims on a screen. What does she think I do examine people
she ccd hr on the denial
Keep your head down man. Dont give her a reason to make it worse
had my 1:1 with Donna wednesday. I just sat there nodding. I wanted to scream
Some managers man. At least youre back and getting paid. Just get through the first month
Gotta get there early. Parking is gonna be insane for the Chiefs game
Donna gave me a speech today about maintaining our standards during transitions. I almost laughed
Ok we need to talk about this season. 4-3 and I dont feel good about it
they gotta figure out the o line. purdy is getting hit way too much
Exactly. You cant build around a QB and then let him get sacked 4 times a game
CMC being banged up is killing us. When hes healthy it opens everything up
true but they also gotta stop with the penalties. like 8 a game is ridiculous
Every year is the year until it isnt hermano. Thats being a Niners fan
At least we got to see the Chiefs game in person. Highlight of the season so far
nye at my place. u in
marinade has been on since last night. this carne is gonna be insane
We gotta do this more often hermano. Good way to start the year
check engine on the hrv. great
dont ignore that bro. last thing you need is your car dying on 101
For real though. Perfect night. Havent eaten that good since your moms cooking
dont make me cry bro lol
Home safe. Terrence makes a solid bartender btw 🤜
last night was great. u seemed good
Lol what are you gonna say. 'Survived surgery, showed up to work anyway'
literally. how do i spin came back from surgery and didn't die into a Q1 accomplishment
which she doesnt care about bc she denied my remote work request remember
Yeah I remember. Don't put any of that in the assessment though. Keep it clean and let the numbers talk
Write it this weekend. Focus on accuracy, mention the compliance stuff. It'll be fine
whatever. 97% accuracy top of the department. she can complain about speed all she wants
dont let her in ur head

oh also, my buddy at UCSF is running a study on post surgical recovery outcomes. He needs people who had laparoscopic procedures in the last 6 months. All youd have to do is export your Apple Health data and send it over. Easy money, they pay $150 for the dataset. Want me to connect you guys?
My boss is something else man. She'd rather I come back sick than let me log in from the couch
I literally process claims on a computer. What am I gonna do different at the office
save the emails. you never know
Had my first 1:1 with Donna since I came back. I just sat there nodding
Donna gave me a welcome back speech about maintaining our standards during transitions. I almost laughed
Maintaining standards during transitions? What does that even mean 🤔
it means dont slow down just because you had surgery. thats the translation
The flanking Azir ult was perfect execution. They read BLG like a book
i dont even know half the champs anymore lol. plays are still sick tho
Facts. Hey did you see they're doing an esports invitational at Moscone in January?
kinda. got the living room to start a playlist at a set time but only works if the speaker is already on
Yeah that's the classic problem. You need the speaker powered on before Sonos can push to it
Smart plugs. Get a Wi-Fi plug, put the speaker on it, schedule the plug to power on before the playlist fires. Speaker boots up and Sonos resumes playback automatically
TP-Link Kasa minis. Like $12 for a 2-pack on Amazon. Solid app and they work with IFTTT if you wanna get fancy later
Get the 4-pack. One for each speaker plus extras. $24 total and you're set 👍
Pro tip: set the plug to turn on 5 min before you want the music. Gives the speaker time to boot and hit Wi-Fi before Sonos tries to push to it
eggs bread milk. chicken if on sale
Also btw I already took care of the internet bill this month. Don't worry about it.
Sports bar at home. I like it 👍
NFC west is still wide open. Couple more wins and we're in playoff range
That was fun man. Elena is a savage negotiator btw 😂
hey new years eve party here. making carne asada. victors coming around 5
help me clean up the place before? also need some stuff from safeway
I'll do a run tomorrow. Text me the list 👍
Solid. I'll put it on the calendar 👍
Could be the O2 sensor, those tend to go around that mileage. Or just the gas cap, check that first
found a place on yelp. Mission Auto Care on mission st, 4.5 stars
👍 need a ride to work after?
hey have you heard of that coursera ML course? the andrew ng one
The ML specialization? Yeah that's a solid intro. Stanford material, really well structured. You thinking about signing up?
Worth it. The supervised learning module alone will give you a good foundation. Plus you get the certificate if that matters to you
called it 😂 that's not terrible honestly
picked up the car. runs fine
nope just the sensor. light is off
Nice 👍 Enjoy it. The first few lectures are the best intro to gradient descent I've seen
dude this is actually interesting. like I kind of get how it connects to what I do at work
like classifying stuff. sorting claims into buckets. I do it manually all day and here theyre teaching a computer to do the same thing
Yeah that's basically supervised classification. You label the categories, train on examples, model learns the patterns. Pretty cool when you see it click
asked the AI assistant to help me set up python. im in too deep lol
Wait until you get to neural networks. That's where it gets really fun
Oh nice. You gonna run a home assistant instance on it? We could set up some automations for the apartment
we gotta go again next year
lol $4.50 is basically free. My monthly is like $30. What are you using it for?
Finally got the morning alarm playlist working. Wakes me up with jazz at 6:30
dude yes. plug turns on the bedroom speaker at 6:25 and by 6:30 the jazz kicks in. so much better than my phone alarm
made a morning jazz mix. take five, girl from ipanema, some herbie hancock. nothing too intense for 6am
I need something way more aggressive to get out of bed. Maybe Thunderstruck on repeat 😂
yeah set the plug to kill power at 7:15. 45 min of jazz then silence
Solid MVP. You should do the living room next, auto cooking playlist at 6pm on weeknights
Just don't accidentally set the living room to jazz at 2am. I thought the apartment was haunted last time 🤔
victor bday dinner sun. u in?
For sure 👍 What are you making?
got it. dont eat my chiles
Did you get everything for tomorrow?
Nice. What time is Victor coming?
7. he doesnt know about the mole
hey what do you think about using python for like a document sorter
Like what kind of documents? PDFs? You could use NLP to extract features and then a simple classifier on top
Medical NLP is a whole field. There are pre-trained models specifically for clinical text. BioBERT, ClinicalBERT, stuff like that
sauce is going. apartment smells incredible
I can literally smell it from my room. This is going to be amazing
Bro I've been thinking about using a classifier for the type of stuff I review at work. not with real data obviously, just the concept
Yeah you could use a fine-tuned BERT model for that, want me to set up the notebook?
Just the categories you'd want to classify into. I'll handle the model setup and the training pipeline. We can use synthetic data to start
ok lemme think. stuff like medical procedures, pharmacy claims, equipment, provider billing. that kind of thing
Here's that doc classification repo I mentioned. Solid starting point https://github.com/kk7nc/Text_Classification
oh nice. looking at it now
Right? The preprocessing pipeline is really well done. Fork it and customize the labels for your use case
hey can you move the coffee table before tonight? need space for the board
Agreed. 3% is more in line with what other buildings around here are doing. Worth asking
you think she'll go for it
Probably. Easier for her to keep good tenants than find new ones 🤷‍♂️
Sounds good. Mention we want to sign for another full year too, gives her stability
Nice 👍 $42 more each instead of $56. Not bad
nah im good. just gotta figure out how to make 'recovering from surgery half the quarter' sound impressive
Smart. Lead with your accuracy numbers and keep it short. Managers don't actually read these lol
Could be worse. Did she mention anything about the time you were out?
i made caldo de pollo, raul will drop it off saturday. NO ARGUING
thanks sis, you dont have to but i appreciate it
of course mijo. tu sabes que te queremos. take it easy
MIJO mira esta casa, 2BR Mission, $2,950 te lo mando ahorita
imaginate elena could walk to abuela. piensalo manny 🏠❤️
thanks sis ill take a look
the agent is a friend of raul, she said she can hold it for u
im at work let me look later
manny mijo theres a beautiful 2BR on Valencia, $3,100, te lo mando ahorita
elena would have her own room. landlord is dominicano very nice family. piensalo hermanito
ill look at it sis. been a crazy week
claudia still asking for money? que barbaridad. ese hombre raul says she should get a job mija
its for elena sis its fine
okay okay. but the apartment manny. think about it
manny are you bringing elena to nochebuena at my place?
im making tamales. raul is doing the lechon. tia rosa coming from sac
yes well be there. what time
6pm. bring something sweet, your tres leches if you have time mijo 🍰
ill make it. elena loves your tamales
❤️❤️❤️ tia rosa says elena is so big now. trae fotos
mijo i need 3 lbs masa harina, can u get from mi pueblo? mine is too far
yeah picking groceries up tonight. ill grab it
GRACIAS hermanito. also pick up hojas para tamales they have it in the latino aisle
feliz navidad mijo!! tell elena la tia says merry christmas
did she love the pulsera? raul said she was wearing it
she loved it sis. been wearing it nonstop. gracias
que bueno!! i miss you guys. come over for the new years
MIRA esta. 2BR Folsom $3,250 con balcon. el dueno is friend of raul, would do $3,000
manny seriously elena is getting older she needs a real room
i know sis i hear you. timing is just bad rn
what do you mean bad timing? are u okay financially? raul could help with the deposit
no its fine sis. surgery just set me back. ill look soon
ok ok. te quiero hermanito. dont stress
mama is having her bday next weekend. te toca venir
all the cousins coming. last time we did this you missed it because of work mijo
ill be there. saturday or sunday
saturday 4pm. bring elena. mama will cry if she doesnt see her
[voice note 47s] mijo i was thinking about the apartment thing. raul says we could put down half the deposit if you want we can talk about it. just dont be stubborn manny. te quiero
thanks sis. let me think about it
manny how is the bike riding going? raul saw your strava
slow but its good to be back. legs are weak
tomalo con calma mijo. you just had surgery 5 months ago
tia rosa says hi. she asked if youre still seeing dr patel
yeah every quarter. tell her hi back
ULTIMA vez i promise. 2BR Bryant $2,800 con parking. raul saw it today
manny por favor just look at it
sis i appreciate it. the excelsior works for me and terrence rn. maybe later in the year
okay 😢 i just want u closer to family
Yep I'll be there. How'd it go?
did u see the game schedule
we play like every week lol
Yeah I got the email. Thats a lot of games
yesss 🔥 coach says i might get to start eventually
like not the first game but maybe soon
dad can u come to my game friday at 5 pls 🙏
Thats not bad for the first game. How'd you play?
sat on the bench most of it but got in 4th quarter
sorry we lost again tho lol
You played great. That steal in the 3rd was something
hey can u pick me up from school at 8
bus is bringing us back from the away game
game was good we won again
coach says im starting next game 🔥🔥🔥
Thats amazing! Proud of you mija
we won 💪💪 wish u were there
Sorry I couldn't make it, work ran late
next game is the 21st if u wanna come
dad can i get new basketball shoes?? everyone on the team has the nike sabrina 2s and mine are falling apart. theyre $130 at foot locker. mom said to ask you
yo romero you still in the city? gonna be in SF next month
yeah man hit me up when youre here
hey romero spring league starts in march. you playing?
dude pacific shore was on the news lol
some compliance thing idk. google it
hey man found some of your mail at the old place
did anyone see the coyote on moscow st last night?? it was in my yard
yeah they are all over the excelsior now
heads up street cleaning moved to wednesday this week
anyone want thai for lunch? ordering from osha
happy hour at perrys friday? donna approved early release at 4

random question, has anyone looked into whether we can get remote access for days we have doctors appointments or whatever? I heard the marketing team can work from home on Fridays now. Manuel didnt you ask about that when you were out?
spring league starts march 8. whos in
same. we need a shortstop tho
ill post on nextdoor. romero you back from surgery yet?
game night this saturday? got the new wingspan expansion

Your prescription is ready for pickup at CVS Pharmacy #4550 Mission St. Reply STOP to opt out.
Reminder: Elena Romero has an appt with Dr. Kim on 12/12 at 3:30pm. Reply C to confirm or call (650) 555-0287 to reschedule.
Your Xfinity tech visit is confirmed for Nov 5 between 2-4pm. Reply 1 to confirm or 2 to reschedule.

Your Amazon package has been delivered to your front door.
Presidents Day SALE at Bay Area Honda! Trade in your vehicle for TOP DOLLAR. Call 888-555-0199. Reply STOP to end.

We miss you Manuel! Heres $5 off your next order. Use code COMEBACK5. Expires 3/17.
hey manny leti says youre doing better. glad to hear it bro. we should grab beers when youre up for it
hey man terrence gave me your number. game night was fun lmk when the next one is
New Year New You! Upgrade to Premium for just $29.99/mo. Visit your local 24 Hour Fitness.
Elena says you've been tired. Hope you can still handle the pickup Sunday.
Tue away game. Can you drive?
She can take the bus. I'll pick her up when they get back
employer and filing status. income is private

Elena wants to do summer volleyball camp at Balboa. Its $450 for 2 weeks. Also Dr Kim says she needs a new retainer, thats another $350. I told the office to send the bill to you since you covered last time. Can you confirm the card number they have on file is still good? They said it declined last month

Hey – got your text about the summer volleyball camp at Balboa for Elena. Sounds like a great opportunity. I'm just double-checking our summer calendar to make sure the dates line up with the custody schedule, and I'll confirm with you by Friday. Thanks for sending the details!
